# Changelog

A small fixture exercising the changelogx parser against the
Keep-a-Changelog format. Used by parse_test.go.

## [Unreleased]

Nothing yet.

## [1.0.0] - 2026-05-25

First stable release.

### Highlights

- contract-first
- observability is a protocol
- forward-compatibility by isolation
- server-side only

## [0.9.0] - 2026-05-01

Beta cut.

### Added

- the inspector
- the templates
